prompt: document what happened — we just created the write-work-log skill. Today is 2026-06-30. [full context about the audit, plan, worktree, skill-creator, 2 divergences]

assertions.text: H1 title does NOT use the backtick ns/module submodule format — it uses a general task title
What didn't go as planned has exactly 2 numbered items
Each numbered divergence item contains 'Why it happened:' and 'Fix for future:'
Lessons learned has at least 1 bullet with bold keyword
File does not contain YAML frontmatter
